---
title: "Kontakt"
title-block-style: none
description: "Kontakta oss för mer information"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
from: markdown+raw_html
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Kontakta <span class="gr">oss</span></h1>
    <p>Frågor, projekt eller bara en konversation — nå oss på <a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a></p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri m-contact-info">
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
          <h3>E-post</h3>
          <p><a href="mailto:office@chen.ist">office@chen.ist</a> — Allmänna frågor</p>
          <p><a href="mailto:support@chen.ist">support@chen.ist</a> — Support</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Huvudkontor</h3>
          <p>Str. Filantropiei, 1-3, 200143<br>Craiova, Rumänien</p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i>
          <h3>Partnerkontor</h3>
          <p>Bukarest, Rumänien<br><a href="mailto:bucharest@chen.ist">bucharest@chen.ist</a></p>
        </div>
        <div class="ci m-social">
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/chenist" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="m-ri m-form">
        <h2 style="text-align:left;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2rem);margin-bottom:2rem;">Skicka ett meddelande</h2>
        <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Fullständigt namn *</label>
              <input type="text" name="name" required placeholder="Ditt fullständiga namn">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>E-post *</label>
              <input type="email" name="email" required placeholder="din@epost.se">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fr">
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Telefon</label>
              <input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="Telefonnummer">
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label>Företag</label>
              <input type="text" name="company" placeholder="Företag (valfritt)">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Intresse *</label>
            <select name="interest" required>
              <option value="">Välj...</option>
              <optgroup label="Tjänster">
                <option value="digital-infrastructure">Digital Infrastruktur</option>
                <option value="cybersecurity">Cybersäkerhet</option>
                <option value="nis2">NIS2-efterlevnad</option>
                <option value="cloud">Molntjänster</option>
              </optgroup>
              <optgroup label="Academy">
                <option value="course">Kursregistrering</option>
                <option value="training">Utbildningsregistrering</option>
                <option value="event">Evenemang / Hackathon</option>
                <option value="webinar">Webbseminarium</option>
                <option value="summer-school">Sommarskola</option>
              </optgroup>
              <option value="general">Allmän förfrågan</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label>Meddelande *</label>
            <textarea name="message" rows="4" required placeholder="Hur kan vi hjälpa dig?"></textarea>
          </div>
          <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Ny kontakt från chen.ist">
          <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="contact-page-sv">
          <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
          <div class="fc">
            <input type="checkbox" required>
            <span>Jag godkänner <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">integritetspolicyn</a> *</span>
          </div>
          <button type="submit"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Skicka meddelande</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Föredrar du ett<br>samtal?</h2>
    <p>Boka direkt i vår kalender. 30 minuter, helt förutsättningslöst.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Boka på Cal.com</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Gratis &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> EU & Internationellt
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
